style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C8E6C9;strokeColor=#388E3C;fontSize=11;fontColor=#1B5E20;" value="<b>事务提交成功 ✅</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="190" x="190" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="crash_note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fillColor=#E8EAF6;strokeColor=#1A237E;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1A237E;rounded=1;" value="<b>⚡ 崩溃恢复时的判断</b><br>PREPARE +
